examples.title: Basic Array Declaration and Initialization
examples.description: Demonstrates array declaration, initialization, and accessing elements using simple arithmetic expressions
examples.explanation: This example shows: (1) Array declaration with size 5, (2) Initialization using initializer list, (3) Accessing elements using zero-based indexing, (4) Performing arithmetic expressions on array elements (addition, multiplication), (5) Storing results back into array elements.

examples.title: Array Operations with Loops and Expressions
examples.description: Demonstrates array traversal with computed expressions to find sum, average, and count of elements
examples.explanation: This example demonstrates: (1) Using loop to traverse array, (2) Compound assignment expression (sum += scores[i]), (3) Type casting in arithmetic expression for float division, (4) Relational expression in if condition (scores[i] > average), (5) Ternary conditional expression for finding maximum.

examples.title: Multi-Dimensional Array with Complex Expressions
examples.description: Advanced example showing 2D array operations with matrix computations and logical expressions
examples.explanation: This advanced example covers: (1) 2D array (matrix) declaration and initialization, (2) Index expressions with arithmetic (matrix[i][2-i] for secondary diagonal), (3) Nested loops for row and column computations, (4) Logical AND expression (matrix[i][j] % 2 == 0 && matrix[i][j] > 0), (5) Modulo and comparison expressions for even/odd detection.
